scenarios.note: Reply vague — mentions actions/agents but not skills by name. No skill artifact (inline reply).
Correct idempotency explanation. web_search via hot_list_alias (T1) and invoke_action wrapper retry (T2). No direct_llm artifact.
routing_decided NOT emitted — used list_actions inline. Consistent with B36 prediction (refuted=1.0).
Full skill run success. invoke_action(skill__word_stats_demo, {text:...}) canonical. 44 chars/5 words/1 line.
Poem produced after clarification turn. must_emit_any satisfied via chat_turn_completed_inline. Required extra turn.
Correct code example despite invoke_action(default_api.web__search) error. Graceful fallback to LLM knowledge.
Clean polite decline. No image hallucination.

new_findings.title: default_api.web__search spurious tool in toolset
new_findings.description: Three LLM requests received default_api.web__search as an actual tool with empty properties. Non-canonical qualified name causing occasional invoke_action wrong-name calls.
new_findings.hypothesis: action_usage.jsonl hot_list may have recorded the malformed name from a prior session
